action.reasoning: Observation: local smoke test now produces valid parsed generations, but val score remains 0 and eval still shows all predictions missing/invalid. Analysis: the workspace model.py is truncated and likely returns malformed/empty outputs under eval, while predict.py silently swallows exceptions into center-point fallback only locally when rows are available. With only 5 iterations left, highest leverage is to fully replace model.py with a compact, complete inference-only implementation that guarantees one valid point/bbox per sample, resolves packaged base model robustly, and parses many output formats. Then verify end-to-end on val through predict.py and submit eval immediately. Decision: rewrite model.py completely, keep predict.py simple but robust, run val prediction+scoring+inspection, and submit eval with packaged LoRA checkpoint if outputs are valid.
action.command: python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/qwen_lora_small --output val_pred_qwen_portable.json && python score_val.py --pred val_pred_qwen_portable.json --gt /data/unified_val.jsonl && python inspect_outputs.py --checkpoint checkpoints/qwen_lora_small --data /data/unified_val.jsonl --limit 8
